## Change Type

- [ ] Doctrine or policy

- Affected doctrine area:

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped and reviewable.
- [ ] I updated related docs, schemas, samples, fixtures, and runners together where needed.
- [ ] I added or updated a regression fixture for unsafe behavior where applicable.
- [ ] I updated `docs/source-map.md` for new external doctrine claims.
- [ ] I ran routing coverage.
- [ ] I documented known limitations or residual risk.
